name: Slayer Of Terramorphous
description: Bandit class mod for Maya the Siren. Drops from Terramorphous the Invincible. Built around Ward, Accelerate, Mind's Eye, Sweet Release, Flicker, Sentry, Ready, Impact, Expertise, Healthy.
notes: Part of a set of Terramorphous-only items. Collecting all of them combines their red text into a short poem.

special.description: At max level, Maya's Slayer of Terramorphous grants: +37% Burn Damage, +37% Ignite Chance, +1,101,229 Health.
